prompt: Studio editorial photograph of a premium skincare vessel (bottle, jar, or tube) in glass or ceramic, with a colored accent detail. Set on a natural stone or marble slab resting on a round mirror, all on a soft neutral surface. Scattered droplets of serum or oil catch the light around the mirror and slab. Aesthetic is minimalist and luxurious, with golden hour tones highlighting natural textures. Style: 3D realism, luxury product photography, shallow depth of field. Format: 1:1, ultra-detailed.
